summary: Completed testing of iteration 10 - Performance fix for Whisper transcription. Key change: POST /api/recordings/upload now returns QUICKLY (~250ms) with only recording_path and filename - NO transcript field. Whisper runs as background asyncio task and updates DB asynchronously. All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.

backend: POST /api/interviews/start - creates interview with configurable num_questions and time_per_question (200)
POST /api/recordings/upload - FAST response (<2s), returns recording_path and filename ONLY, NO transcript field (200)
POST /api/feedback - saves feedback to DB with feedback_id (200)
frontend: Landing page loads with testimonials section
Login page has forgot password link (data-testid='forgot-password-link')
Login page has NO Google button (as expected)
Login with test@example.com/test123 works - navigates to dashboard
Dashboard loads with stats (6 Total Interviews, 2 Completed, 3 In Progress, 7 Questions Answered)
Dashboard shows Role-Based and Resume-Based interview options
Signup page has 3-step OTP flow (Step 1: email + Send OTP, Step 2: OTP input + Verify, Step 3: name/password)
Signup page has NO Google button (as expected)
Contact page has functional form (name, email, subject, message, submit)
Feedback page has star rating (5 stars) and submit button
Profile page has picture upload button (data-testid='change-picture-btn')
Profile page has Change Email button (data-testid='change-email-btn')
Profile page shows stats (6 Total Interviews, 2 Completed, Apr 2026 Member Since)
Fullscreen gate has 'Enter Fullscreen & Start' button (data-testid='enter-fullscreen-btn')

critical_code_review_comments: PERFORMANCE FIX VERIFIED: /api/recordings/upload now returns in <2 seconds (was 10-30s before)
Upload response correctly returns only recording_path and filename - NO transcript field
Whisper transcription runs in background via asyncio.create_task(_transcribe_background(...))
Background task updates interview responses in MongoDB after transcription completes
LiveInterview.js correctly saves 'Transcribing...' as placeholder transcript since upload no longer returns transcript
seed_data_creation: Created test user via mongosh with bcrypt password hash for 'test123'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested the PERFORMANCE FIX for Whisper transcription. Key change: POST /api/recordings/upload now returns QUICKLY (~250ms) with only recording_path and filename - NO transcript field in response. Whisper runs as background asyncio task (_transcribe_background) and updates the interview responses in MongoDB asynchronously. LiveInterview.js saves 'Transcribing...' as placeholder. Database was COMPLETELY WIPED before this iteration - test user created via mongosh. Test credentials: test@example.com / test123. All auth endpoints (send-otp, verify-otp, register, login, forgot-password) working. All interview endpoints working. All profile endpoints working. Fullscreen gate for LiveInterview working.

other_endpoints.feedback: POST /api/feedback - saves to DB, GET /api/feedbacks - returns list

frontend_features.login_page: Has forgot password link, NO Google button
